skill.name: deployment-automation
skill.description: Automate application deployment to cloud platforms and servers. Use when setting up CI/CD pipelines, deploying to Docker/Kubernetes, or configuring cloud infrastructure. Handles GitHub Actions, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, Vercel, and deployment best practices.
skill.summary: Automate application deployment to cloud platforms and servers with CI/CD pipelines, Docker, Kubernetes, and zero-downtime strategies.
skill.author: supercent-io

security_audit.summary: All 60 static findings are false positives. The skill contains documentation and code templates for deployment automation. Detected 'external_commands' are shell script examples in code blocks. Network URLs are documentation links. Environment access patterns teach proper secret management using GitHub Actions secrets and Kubernetes secrets - security best practices.

content.value_statement: Manual deployment is slow and error-prone. This skill provides ready-to-use templates for Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, and zero-downtime deployment strategies so you can ship faster with confidence.
actual_capabilities: Generate Dockerfiles with multi-stage builds for optimized images
Create GitHub Actions CI/CD workflows with test, build, and deploy stages
Design Kubernetes deployment manifests with health checks and autoscaling
Implement zero-downtime deployment strategies (blue-green, rolling updates)
Configure Vercel deployments with environment variables and security headers
Set up Docker Compose configurations for local development
limitations: Does not execute deployments - provides templates and guidance only
Requires existing cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP, Kubernetes cluster)
Does not generate cloud-specific infrastructure code (Terraform, CloudFormation)
Does not include monitoring or logging setup details

use_cases.title: Set Up CI/CD Pipeline
use_cases.description: Create a complete GitHub Actions workflow that runs tests, builds Docker images, and deploys to production on merge to main branch.
use_cases.target_user: Developers new to DevOps who need automated deployments

use_cases.title: Containerize Application
use_cases.description: Generate a production-ready Dockerfile with multi-stage builds, non-root user, and health checks for any Node.js application.

use_cases.title: Deploy to Kubernetes
use_cases.description: Create Kubernetes deployment, service, and horizontal pod autoscaler manifests with proper resource limits and readiness probes.
use_cases.target_user: Platform engineers scaling applications on K8s

prompt_templates.title: Basic Docker Setup
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a Dockerfile for a Node.js application using multi-stage builds with a production-optimized image.
prompt_templates.scenario: You have a Node.js app in the current directory and need to containerize it for production deployment.

prompt_templates.title: CI/CD Pipeline
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow that runs tests on pull requests and deploys to production on push to main branch.
prompt_templates.scenario: You want automated testing and deployment for your project using GitHub Actions.

prompt_templates.title: Kubernetes Deployment
prompt_templates.prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment and service manifests for a Node.js API with 3 replicas, resource limits, and health checks.
prompt_templates.scenario: You need to deploy your containerized application to a Kubernetes cluster with proper configuration.

prompt_templates.title: Zero-Downtime Deploy
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a blue-green deployment strategy using Docker Compose and nginx for switching between application versions.
prompt_templates.scenario: You need to deploy updates without service interruption and want a rollback strategy.

output_examples.input: Create a Dockerfile for a Node.js application
output_examples.output: A Dockerfile with multi-stage build, production dependencies, non-root user, health check, and optimal image size

output_examples.input: Generate GitHub Actions workflow for CI/CD
output_examples.output: Complete workflow with test job, build job with Docker push, and deploy job using SSH to production server
Deployment manifest with 3 replicas, resource requests/limits, liveness/readiness probes, HPA targeting 70% CPU

best_practices: Use multi-stage Docker builds to minimize image size and attack surface
Store secrets in environment variables or secret managers, never commit to git
Implement health checks and readiness probes for reliable Kubernetes deployments
Use rolling updates instead of recreate strategy to ensure zero downtime
anti_patterns: Using the 'latest' tag for Docker images in production - always use specific version tags
Running containers as root user - create a dedicated non-root user
Hardcoding secrets in configuration files - use environment variables or secrets management
Deploying without health checks - always include liveness and readiness probes

faq.question: Does this skill actually deploy my application?
faq.answer: No, this skill generates deployment configuration files and provides guidance. You need to execute the deployments using the generated configurations.

faq.question: Which cloud platforms does this support?
faq.answer: This skill covers Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, and Vercel. It can be adapted for AWS, GCP, Azure, or any Kubernetes-based deployment.

faq.question: Do I need Docker installed?
faq.answer: Yes, Docker is required to build and test the container images described in this skill.

faq.question: How secrets in deployments do I handle?
faq.answer: Use environment variables, GitHub Actions secrets, Kubernetes secrets, or cloud secret managers. Never hardcode secrets in configuration files.

faq.question: What is zero-downtime deployment?
faq.answer: Zero-downtime deployment updates your application without service interruption. This skill covers blue-green and rolling update strategies.

faq.question: Can I use this with Claude Code?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code. You can ask Claude to generate deployment configurations using this skill.
